rationale: The citation is used to justify and implement a specific interaction-probing method in the empirical analysis, not just as background. In Study 1, the authors explicitly report a floodlight analysis and Johnson-Neyman regions and cite Spiller et al. (2013) as the methodological source for that procedure. This gives the cited paper a clear functional role in how results are tested and interpreted.
relation_description: The citing paper applies Spiller et al. (2013)'s floodlight/simple-effects framework to probe a continuous interaction (company size x perceived industry tech level) and identify regions where the size effect is significant. The cited work is used as methodological guidance for moderated regression interpretation.
